response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 15+ years of development experience and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test runners, assertion libraries, CI infrastructure, MCP code generators), but the role is a Level II people-management position requiring at least 2 years of formal people management and 3 years of technical leadership. The resume shows no direct reports, no team leadership roles, and no organizational-change experience; mobile exposure is limited to a brief iOS/Apple TV stint a decade ago. This is a mismatch in role type rather than technical ability.
strengths: Extensive hands-on developer-tools work: test runners (Trial), assertion libraries, Selenium training, CI/CD and GitLab infrastructure
15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, courses, and community talks
concerns: No formal people-management experience; all roles are individual-contributor positions
No evidence of strategic roadmap ownership or leading organizational change
Mobile-platform experience is dated (2015-2016) and shallow relative to the role's mobile ecosystem focus

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and testing infrastructure background
Lacks demonstrated technical leadership at org level
